explanations.4: insertAfterMso means this custom tab will appear right after Microsoft's built-in View tab in the ribbon.
explanations.13: imageMso="HappyFace" uses a pre-made icon from Office's library instead of loading a custom image file.
explanations.17: onAction="OnButtonClicked" is the name of a function (probably in VBA or another language) that runs when someone clicks this button.
explanations.25: onChange="OnEditBoxTextChanged" triggers a function whenever the user types or modifies the text in this edit box.
